form.label: Client Monitoring
form.description: Monitor DNS activity by client device

search.query: `pihole_base` client_ip=$client_filter$ client_ip=* | stats dc(client_ip) as unique_clients
`pihole_base` client_ip=$client_filter$ client_ip=* | timechart span=30m dc(client_ip) as "Active Clients"

`pihole_base` client_ip=$client_filter$ client_ip=* | eval is_blocked=if(match(_raw, "gravity blocked|exactly denied|special domain|Apple iCloud Private Relay|Designated Resolver|is 0\.0\.0\.0"), 1, 0) | eval is_cached=if(match(_raw, "cached"), 1, 0) | stats count as "Total Queries", sum(is_blocked) as "Blocked Queries", sum(is_cached) as "Cached Queries", dc(domain) as "Unique Domains" by client_ip | eval "Block Rate %" = round((('Blocked Queries'/'Total Queries')*100), 2) | eval "Cache Rate %" = round((('Cached Queries'/'Total Queries')*100), 2) | sort -"Total Queries" | head 20
`pihole_base` client_ip=$client_filter$ client_ip=* | stats count by client_ip | sort -count | head 10
`pihole_base` client_ip=$client_filter$ client_ip=* | eval hour=strftime(_time, "%H") | stats count by client_ip, hour | sort client_ip, hour
`pihole_base` client_ip=$client_filter$ client_ip=* | eval hour=strftime(_time, "%H") | stats count by client_ip, hour | sort -count | head 50

`pihole_base` client_ip=$client_filter$ client_ip=* | eval action=case( match(_raw, "gravity blocked|exactly denied|Apple iCloud Private Relay|Designated Resolver|special domain|is 0\.0\.0\.0|is ::$"), "blocked", match(_raw, "Rate-limiting"), "rate_limited", match(_raw, "forwarded"), "forwarded", match(_raw, "cached-stale"), "cached_stale", match(_raw, "cached"), "cached", match(_raw, "reply"), "reply", match(_raw, "/etc/hosts"), "local_lookup", match(_raw, "query\["), "query", 1=1, "other" ) | stats count by client_ip, action | sort client_ip, -count

div.p: xPi-Hole for Splunk | Copyright 2024-2025 xTechnix Inc. | All Rights Reserved
